attr.title: Death Road to Canada
attr.desc: Control a car full of jerks as they explore cities, recruit weird people, rescue dogs, argue with each other, and face gigantic swarms of slow zombies. Randomly generated for a new story and rare events every time you play!
attr.inst: STEAM:Open the Steam Console and use 'download_depot 252610 252612 5968100789458006612'to download the correct version of the game. The Steam Console will tell you where the location to find these files is after the download. GOG:Using GOG, you'll need to go to your games list and find 'Manage' for this game. Turn off automatic downloads and then download the version that is BEFORE 05-31-2026. Use those game files. Then dump them straight into /ports/deathroad/. From there, just go launch the game via your device
